aps.rulegroupsnamespace.Data.Description: The rules definition file for this namespace.

aps.rulegroupsnamespace.Name.Description: The name of the rule groups namespace. This property is required.

aps.rulegroupsnamespace.Tags.Description: A list of key and value pairs for the workspace resources.

aps.rulegroupsnamespace.Workspace.Description: The ARN of the workspace that contains this rule groups namespace.
